title: DRBUDDI for MRI Processing
author: Courtney Comrie
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7vehn3e

steps.title: DRBUDDI is a EPI distortion correction module in TORTOISE
steps.instruction: DRBUDDI is a EPI distortion correction module in TORTOISE. It bases its corrections by using DTI data pairs (blip up and blip down). When processing MR images DRBUDDI is usually the second step in the pipeline.

steps.title: In terminal go to your directory with the DTI data
steps.instruction: In terminal go to your directory with the DTI data.

steps.title: Type the following in the terminal to view information DR_BUDDI_withoutGUI
steps.instruction: Type the following in the terminal to view information DR_BUDDI_withoutGUI

steps.title: In terminal type
steps.instruction: In terminal type: DR_BUDDI _withoutGUI --up _data directory(blip up)/file_name_proc.list --down_data directory(blip down)/file_name_proc.list --structural directory_T2Data/file_name_structural.nii

steps.title: You should have two corresponding data...
steps.instruction: You should have two corresponding data sets to edit, and you will need to distinguish them when you call DRBUDDI i.e. blip up and blip down

steps.title: NOTE
steps.instruction: NOTE: There are two DRBUDDI versions available to use. There is a DRBUDDI with a GUI, and there is one without a GUI.
